---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 12
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
---

A collection of projects, datasets, and tools.

<!--
  FORMATTING RECOMMENDATIONS
  ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  • Grid layout shows thumbnail cards; switch to type: default
    for a more compact list view.
  • Each project lives in its own folder: projects/<slug>/index.qmd.
  • Use categories for tagging (e.g., "Dataset", "ML", "Tool").
  • filter-ui and sort-ui let visitors search and reorder.
-->
